nodes.label: Home Screen Active State — Reminders + Ritual + Learning (button-nudge-final)
nodes.description: Home tab in Activo state (Estado=Activo in dev panel). Dynamic Island shows '3 apps fuera de tu mente' with Instagram, TikTok, YouTube chips as active blockers. Section 'Tu ritual de hoy — Sin rutinas, agrégalas que quieres practicar' with '+' CTA 'Configurar rutinas del ritual' (Meditación, respiración, movimiento y más). Section 'Mi aprendizaje del día' with '+' CTA 'Agregar contenido al día' (Audiolibros, charlas y meditaciones de Explorar). Section 'Recordatorios — 4 activos' listing: Meditar 5 min (07:00, Diario), Hidratarse (Cada semana, Diario), Cierre del día (21:55, Diario), Llamar a mamá (22:00). '+ Agregar recordatorio' link at bottom.

nodes.label: Dynamic Island — Active App Blocker indicator
nodes.description: Dynamic Island at top of screen displays live app blocking status: '3 apps fuera de tu mente' with teal icon. Shows chips for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube as currently blocked apps. Also shows 'Descanso' label on right side indicating break/rest mode. This is the persistent blocking status indicator visible system-wide.

nodes.label: Reminders Section — '4 activos' with daily schedule items
nodes.description: Reminders section on Home tab showing 4 active reminders in a list: Meditar 5 min (07:00 Diario), Hidratarse (Cada semana Diario), Cierre del día (21:55 Diario), Llamar a mamá (22:00). Each row shows reminder name, time, and frequency. '+ Agregar recordatorio' CTA at bottom. Items have dismiss/check affordance on right.
